'''âk-d-w-sh''' ('''kakadweshoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vroom|vroom]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-d-w-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vroom|vroom]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âk-d-w-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kakadweshoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikadweshoko|thikadweshoko]] || [[word:jikadweshoko|jikadweshoko]] || [[word:shikadweshoko|shikadweshoko]] || [[word:kikadweshoko|kikadweshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthukadweshoko|thuthukadweshoko]] || [[word:jujukadweshoko|jujukadweshoko]] || [[word:shushukadweshoko|shushukadweshoko]] || [[word:kukukadweshoko|kukukadweshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thukadweshoko|thukadweshoko]] || [[word:jukadweshoko|jukadweshoko]] || [[word:shukadweshoko|shukadweshoko]] || [[word:kukadweshoko|kukadweshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thukadweshoko|thukadweshoko]] || [[word:jukadweshoko|jukadweshoko]] || [[word:shukadweshoko|shukadweshoko]] || [[word:kukadweshoko|kukadweshoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thekadweshoko|thekadweshoko]] || [[word:jekadweshoko|jekadweshoko]] || [[word:shekadweshoko|shekadweshoko]] || [[word:kekadweshoko|kekadweshoko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thokadweshoko|thokadweshoko]] || [[word:jokadweshoko|jokadweshoko]] || [[word:shokadweshoko|shokadweshoko]] || [[word:kokadweshoko|kokadweshoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokadweshoko|thokadweshoko]] || [[word:jokadweshoko|jokadweshoko]] || [[word:shokadweshoko|shokadweshoko]] || [[word:kokadweshoko|kokadweshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠkadweshoko|thĂŠkadweshoko]] || [[word:jĂŠkadweshoko|jĂŠkadweshoko]] || [[word:shĂŠkadweshoko|shĂŠkadweshoko]] || [[word:kĂŠkadweshoko|kĂŠkadweshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathakadweshoko|thathakadweshoko]] || [[word:jajakadweshoko|jajakadweshoko]] || [[word:shashakadweshoko|shashakadweshoko]] || [[word:kakakadweshoko|kakakadweshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thakadweshoko|thakadweshoko]] || [[word:jakadweshoko|jakadweshoko]] || [[word:shakadweshoko|shakadweshoko]] || [[word:kakadweshoko|kakadweshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thakadweshoko|thakadweshoko]] || [[word:jakadweshoko|jakadweshoko]] || [[word:shakadweshoko|shakadweshoko]] || [[word:kakadweshoko|kakadweshoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
